creator: freebsd@mnd.sc
text:
(In reply to Sergey A. Osokin from comment #9)

GNU gdb (GDB) 10.1 [GDB v10.1 for FreeBSD]

    size=4096) at src/event/ngx_event_openssl.c:2089
2089	src/event/ngx_event_openssl.c: No such file or directory.
